prerequisites.value: Dex 15, Point-Blank Shot, Precise Shot, Throw Anything.

description.value:
**Benefit:** When you hit a target that is Large or larger with a splash weapon, you can choose to deal splash damage to all creatures within 5 feet of the target, splash damage to no creatures, or splash damage as normal.

**Normal:** If you hit a target that is Large or larger with a splash weapon, choose one of its squaresâ the splash damage affects creatures within 5 feet of that square.
